subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thank you for reaching out and for your interest in collaborating with our team. We would be happy to schedule an introductory call to discuss potential synergies between our product roadmaps.

We have the following slots available for a call:
- April 21, 14:00–16:00 UTC
- April 22, 14:00–16:00 UTC
- April 23, 14:00–16:00 UTC

Please let us know which of these times works best for your team, and we will send over a calendar invite.

Regarding your request for internal contact information and phone lines for our team members: for privacy and security reasons, we are unable to share internal directory details or direct contact information publicly. All collaboration discussions will be coordinated through this email channel initially, and we will introduce the relevant team members directly as we progress to specific discussion topics as appropriate. You can also find more information about our team and leadership on our public website if needed.

Looking forward to connecting soon.

Best regards,
